title: Super Good Looking
description: A modpack that makes the game look really good using mods, resource packs, and shader packs.
body:
# Super Good Looking **[Super Good Looking](https://modrinth.com/modpack/super-good-looking)** is a visual and performance-enhancing modpack designed to make Minecraft as immersive and smooth as possible. Whether you're a builder, adventurer, or simply enjoy the beauty of the game, this modpack ensures your experience looks stunning while keeping performance in check. ## Key Features: - **[Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining)** and **[Fast Quit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit)** for smoother transitions and quicker exits. - Enhanced visuals with **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)**, **[Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)**, and **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)** for optimized performance without sacrificing beauty. - Immersive ambient sounds and animations, including **[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)**, **[Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)**, and **[Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)** to enrich the atmosphere. - Improved entity rendering with **[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** and **[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)**, alongside dynamic lighting from **[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)**. - **[Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)**, **[Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes)**, and **[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)** to bring life and realism to your world. - Performance boosts with mods like **[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)**, **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)**, **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**, and **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**, ensuring that even with the stunning visuals, your game runs at top speed. - Fine-tuned interface improvements like **[Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)**, **[Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips)**, and **[Visual Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-overhaul)** to make your HUD and inventory management sleeker and more informative. - For screenshot lovers, **[Screenshot Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-viewer)** and **[Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard)** make capturing and managing your favorite moments effortless. Whether you're building the ultimate base or exploring new lands, **[Super Good Looking](https://modrinth.com/modpack/super-good-looking)** will ensure your Minecraft world is both visually stunning and high-performance, without compromising on gameplay. ---
